reviews.name: places/ChIJq_tT7Jy8YIcRMr1o9CibICk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pkemMwUmxiVkpXWDNGcVQydEZRMmxLU0RaQ1VWRRAB
reviews.text: This place is absolutely amazing. Vicky, will be the reason I return. I felt like she really listened to what I wanted and she didn’t pressure me into buying anything I didn’t need. Plus she’s hot. Highly recommend!!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJq_tT7Jy8YIcRMr1o9CibICk/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2NU4zRWNnEAE
reviews.text: Truly can’t rave enough about this place! The ladies are always so welcoming with a smile on their face, they make me feel so welcome and I always leave feeling better than when i entered. I also can’t recommend the B12 shots enough, they have absolutely changed my life! You all rock!

reviews.name: places/ChIJq_tT7Jy8YIcRMr1o9CibICk/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwcXE2VFpBEAE
reviews.text: I’ve had the best experiences at Rejuvenate You! I’ve had Vitamin IV Therapy, vitamin shots, Vampire Facial, fillers, and Botox. Every encounter with the ladies providing services has been amazing! I would highly recommend making them your “go to”  for these types of services. They always make you feel comfortable and welcome.

reviews.name: places/ChIJq_tT7Jy8YIcRMr1o9CibICk/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUbUlxZ21nRRAB
reviews.text: I had the best experience with the ladies at Rejuvenate you! The most friendly, kind, and empathetic team. I had lip filler done, and they thoroughly explained the procedure and answered all of my questions! They made me feel welcome and I like I belonged. If you’ve been thinking about having a procedure done this is your sign. You won’t regret it. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ I will definitely be returning 🖤

reviews.name: places/ChIJq_tT7Jy8YIcRMr1o9CibICk/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xsb2JXZHVRVGt3WlhCSGQycFlYM2RJYVVSTU1XYxAB
reviews.text: This is an amazing experience! Vicki is wonderful and knows what she’s doing. Here’s your sign, down think about it, just do it!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9yeEtpE7b4cRO8INkDOjPjc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25adE9WOWhkMUF5TTBKdVozRkhaRzF2Y2pRMWRsRRAB
reviews.text: This place is not an actual company. They aren’t located where it says they are. When you do get ahold of them very pushy and it’s a completely different company seems very suspicious and almost scam

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9yeEtpE7b4cRO8INkDOjPjc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT20xbU0wRkhTVTE2WjBJM1dWUjZhVGc0YjBoTVJWRRAB
reviews.text: Online request answered quickly. Scheduling was simple and on time. Energy feels steadier and focus lasts longer through the day.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ9yeEtpE7b4cRO8INkDOjPjc/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pCdlgwVlZUVkl0U1VOTmVqQllNbXRyZEY5U1JHYxAB
reviews.text: It amazes me how this clinic gets such rave reviews when I can't even confirm this place even exists. I have left several messages on their website and they have not been acknowledged. I physically went to the place where it is supposedly located and it's not there. Who is paying for their active website?

name: Cowboy Concierge Medicine
classificationReason: Concierge medicine typically offers testosterone and hormone management

reviews.name: places/ChIJa_qiyN85b4cRZYNxhwuPUzE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4TFdYQkVSM056V0VzdE1GaENRV1JtTmpWRVVVRRAB
reviews.text: I recently moved to cheyenne wyoming and have struggled to find a place to do allergy injections for me. Cowboy concierge has been beyond considerate of my needs and helping me through everything. They are more than a medical clinic, they are caring, and will try anything to give you the medical attention you deserve. I strongly recommend them.

reviews.name: places/ChIJa_qiyN85b4cRZYNxhwuPUzE/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXbXVhMFFREAE
reviews.text: Jason is amazing, I can’t sing his praises enough. My dad was incredibly sick, and after explaining the situation to Jason, he was at their house within an hour. Jason saved his life, and we are eternally grateful. It felt like an old friend was hanging out in their living room, not a doctor we had just met. Jason was knowledgeable, respectful, relatable, and the absolute best doctor I’ve ever met. From the bottom of my heart, thank you.

reviews.name: places/ChIJa_qiyN85b4cRZYNxhwuPUzE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4Z3BfcTRnRRAB
reviews.text: I am so thankful we found these guys. I would highly recommend. They are there to help you as a patient get the care you need. Before we even started as patients Jason spent the time on the phone talking and hearing my concerns and answering all my questions. It was the most laid back doctor apt I have ever taken my kids and myself to.From walking in the doors to leaving it was exceptional. This is defenitely our new primary care office!

reviews.name: places/ChIJa_qiyN85b4cRZYNxhwuPUzE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKMUtudXJnRRAB
reviews.text:
There are so many wonderful things I can share about Dr. Caswell and Maggie.  The bottom line is they are amazing.  They listen, they care and they are involved.  My health is not good on many different levels and I feel more than confident in how they are managing my diseases.  Thank you Jason and Maggie, you guys are the best.

Shauna Vigil

reviews.name: places/ChIJa_qiyN85b4cRZYNxhwuPUzE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1X1pIRWdBRRAB
reviews.text: Wyoming needed a prominent concierge medical practice, and Dr. Caswell is doing a great job providing a great experience for his patients. If you want a physician that is responsive, caring, and goes the extra mile then I highly recommend Cowboy Concierge Medicine. Even better, the pricing is transparent and extremely fair considering the current health care ecosystem. A highly individualized, comfortable medical experience. Very refreshing!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ79HXCKY7b4cRyYgj-8iXo5k/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURILXEyM3RBRRAB
reviews.text: I am beyond pleased with my experience with Kelly and all of the staff at Healthy Lifestyle! Kelly takes the time to thoroughly listen to my concerns while giving me an incredible amount of education on what options might be best for me. Under her care, my quality of life has truly improved since my first visit with Healthy Lifestyle! I always leave my appointments feeling valued as a patient. Each and every staff member is so friendly and welcoming. I am so thankful for HLM and I cannot recommend them enough!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ79HXCKY7b4cRyYgj-8iXo5k/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlNS02aXJnRRAB
reviews.text: From the moment I stepped into the office all employees were so caring and welcoming. Anna and Abbey were very friendly and efficient getting me checked in for my appointment. Trisha was great with getting all necessary information-BP, etc. and helping me feel comfortable. Kelly Gebauer was thorough, caring and took time to really listen and treat the symptoms I was experiencing. Taylor was perfect drawing blood too! I will highly recommend this practice. They really listen and seem to care. They have a top notch team!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ79HXCKY7b4cRyYgj-8iXo5k/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1bzViUUR3EAE
reviews.text:
Your experience from the front desk, checking your vitals, and seeing Kelly is wonderful. The amount of time and true caring from not only Kelly but all the staff has exceeded my expectations.
I have embraced the suggestions Kelly makes and appreciate that she let's me make an informative choice on my health care options.

Can't say enough kind words ❤️

reviews.name: places/ChIJ79HXCKY7b4cRyYgj-8iXo5k/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVOUlMM2N3EAE
reviews.text: I have been a patient of Dr. Van Kirk for the past six years. Never have I had a physician who has helped me with my health issues so thoroughly as Dr. Van Kirk. She treats the whole patient! Yes, the WHOLE PATIENT!!!! I credit her for the successful pregnancy and birth of my daughter! Currently, her and her incredible staff are helping me treat my health issues and establish an enjoyable, livable and attainable healthy lifestyle. I cannot say enough wonderful things about Dr. Van Kirk and her staff and highly recommend this clinic to everyone!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ79HXCKY7b4cRyYgj-8iXo5k/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVMmVLanR3RRAB
reviews.text: Recommendations from friends about the friendly and supportive atmosphere at Healthy Lifestyle Medicine were right on target. I’ve never visited a clinician who seemed to personally invest in my health and success. The entire staff is welcoming which lends to the safe and trustful environment. Dr. Van Kirk has done a wonderful job of developing a clinic to serve Cheyenne.

reviews.name: places/ChIJv_rzm5IbU1MRzn0s-qc4FPU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT210MWJIaElPRlpSU2pKVVdYSnZMVWh4YVRGWlQyYxAB
reviews.text: Prometheuz has been incredibly supportive since I started with them, helping to drive my wellbeing. Would recommend.

reviews.name: places/ChIJv_rzm5IbU1MRzn0s-qc4FPU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZMHBMekpBEAE
reviews.text: PrometheuzHRT has been incredible. The staff is knowledgeable, compassionate, and truly listens. They made the HRT process smooth and personalized, and I've felt a huge improvement in my energy and overall well-being. Highly recommend to anyone considering hormone therapy!

reviews.name: places/ChIJv_rzm5IbU1MRzn0s-qc4FPU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VMSFAyZG02Z2RlZndRRRAB
reviews.text: I have been on TRT for a little over 11 years, and I have been using Prometheuz for a little over a year, and they are the best TRT/HRT clinic I have used.  The doctor was great about answering any questions that I had, and Anastasiya is always very pleasant and helpful when I call into the clinic.  They are very knowledgeable about all of the medications they prescribe, and I am a bigger part of my own treatment with Prometheuz.  I cannot recommend them enough.

reviews.name: places/ChIJv_rzm5IbU1MRzn0s-qc4FPU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNZd3FpYllREAE
reviews.text: The Team at Prometheuz HRT is top notch. Always on top of providing the best care and putting the patient first. I’m telling everyone I know about them. They teach and educate as they help optimize your health!

reviews.name: places/ChIJv_rzm5IbU1MRzn0s-qc4FPU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VOdlF3dXliMWRpaGhBRRAB
reviews.text: My experience here has been very good, products and medications all arrive on time and customer service has been top notch! Very responsive team here and I trust them with my business. Would absolutely recommend to those interested!

reviews.name: places/ChIJc0u5FslhWocRhloBO4ayEEU/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOTlRXbFZXakZ4V2pOU09FdG9lREprVUc1Tk1rRRAB
reviews.text: Dr Frank’s is attentive, kind, and passionate about not only his patients, but the depths of  integrative medicine. He is incredibly knowledgeable in autoimmune illnesses, hormone replacement, weight loss and of course one of the best general surgeons. You are always in good hands under his care!

reviews.name: places/ChIJc0u5FslhWocRhloBO4ayEEU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURybm9EbzNnRRAB
reviews.text: Chad Franks is one of the best doctors I have ever received care from. He did my gallbladder surgery. He is very caring and professional. By far the best in Wyoming. I would recommend him to everyone.

reviews.name: places/ChIJc0u5FslhWocRhloBO4ayEEU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNQM3VqYWxRRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Franks is a remarkable doctor and an important resource in Sweetwater County and the state. He listens compassionately and provides focused attention to individual needs. I greatly appreciate having him in the Rock Springs area!

reviews.name: places/ChIJc0u5FslhWocRhloBO4ayEEU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwNlBHcGhRRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Franks is absolutely wonderful! He truly cares about you. I have never had a physician explain things the way he does. The staff is great also-all very friendly and kind.

reviews.name: places/ChIJc0u5FslhWocRhloBO4ayEEU/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNGamNENEtnEAE
reviews.text: Dr Franks, Chris and Melissa are amazing. From making the appt with Chris, chatting with Melissa during intake and getting check out by Dr Franks you feel like you belong there and are more than just a patient. Dr.Franks has me feeling 15 yrs younger!!  I am so thankful I found them.
